nodes.title: Adopt Clean Architecture for core logic
Validate YAML frontmatter with JSON Schema
Define compliance checking rules and severities
Exclude governance templates from compliance scanning
Add Minimal Repo Configuration For Brownfield Adoption
Use XDG Org Profiles and Vendoring

nodes.description: Functional design for the meminit migrate-templates command to convert legacy templates and configurations to Templates v2 format.
nodes.title: Template Migration Tool (meminit migrate-templates)

nodes.description: Functional design for the meminit new command using Templates v2 system.
nodes.title: Document Factory (meminit new) - Templates v2

nodes.description: Protocol asset registry, ownership model, marker grammar, drift detection (protocol check), and safe remediation (protocol sync).
nodes.title: Protocol Asset Governance

nodes.description: Work queue query surface for agentic coding agents over project-state.yaml v2 schema.
nodes.title: Agent Work Queue Queries

nodes.description: Execution plan for redefining files_checked, adding counters, and rolling output_schema_version 2.0 for check JSON outputs.
nodes.title: files_checked output contract refactor

nodes.description: Reviewed and prioritised atomic worklist for the remaining known backlog, aligned to MEMINIT-PLAN-005 and engineering-principles-v1.1.
nodes.title: Atomic Worklist for Known Backlog

nodes.description: Scope and architecture boundary for org-level config (P3.1 from MEMINIT-PLAN-006)
nodes.title: P3.1 Scope Decision: Org-Level Config

nodes.description: Phased improvement programme for Meminit as a stronger platform for agentic coding agents.
nodes.title: Agentic Coding vNext Programme

nodes.description: Detailed implementation plan for MEMINIT-PLAN-008 Phase 0 foundation hardening.
nodes.title: Phase 0 Detailed Implementation Plan

nodes.description: Detailed implementation plan for MEMINIT-PLAN-008 Phase 1 agent contract core.
nodes.title: Phase 1 Detailed Implementation Plan

nodes.description: Detailed implementation plan for MEMINIT-PLAN-008 Phase 2 repository graph work.
nodes.title: Phase 2 Detailed Implementation Plan

nodes.description: Detailed implementation plan for MEMINIT-PLAN-008 Phase 3 protocol governance work.
nodes.title: Phase 3 Detailed Implementation Plan

nodes.description: Detailed implementation plan for MEMINIT-PLAN-008 Phase 4 work queue layer.
nodes.title: Phase 4 Detailed Implementation Plan

nodes.description: Detailed implementation plan for MEMINIT-PLAN-008 Phase 5 scale and streaming work.
nodes.title: Phase 5 Detailed Implementation Plan

nodes.description: Unified, deterministic CLI output contracts, agent bootstrap protocol, and machine-safe orchestration surface for meminit.
nodes.title: Agent Interface v1

nodes.description: Harden scan and fix workflows to bring existing repos to first-green quickly and safely.
nodes.title: Brownfield Adoption Hardening

nodes.description: Next-step improvements beyond Agent Interface v1: capability negotiation, streaming outputs, correlation support, stronger schemas, and better integration with agent protocol files/skills.
nodes.title: Agent Interface v2

nodes.description: Defines a template contract for meminit new that produces deterministic, agent-friendly document bodies: stable section IDs, explicit placeholders, and embedded prompt guidance. Specifies evolution from templates v1 to a unified document_types schema (single source of truth) with built-in fallback templates, a single {{variable}} interpolation syntax, and robust section parsing for orchestrators.
nodes.title: Document Templates v2 — Content Archetypes for Human & Machine Authoring

nodes.description: Centralized project-state tracking and generated dashboard views (table + kanban) that surface document governance status and implementation state without violating byte-invariance of approved documents.
nodes.notes: Successfully implemented dashboard and kanban features
nodes.title: Project State Dashboard

nodes.description: Production-grade, profile-driven, idempotent greenfield bootstrap for Meminit-governed repositories. Defines a registry-backed installer architecture (DocOps tree, protocol assets, pre-commit, CI, GitHub hygiene), a persisted setup manifest, deterministic upgrade semantics, and a reusable installer contract that the planned brownfield hardening will consume.
nodes.title: Greenfield Repository Bootstrap

nodes.description: Normative JSON output contract and error envelope for v2-migrated meminit CLI commands (currently check).
nodes.title: Agent Output Contract

nodes.description: Normative JSON format for brownfield scan plans and plan-driven fixes.
nodes.title: Scan Plan Format

nodes.description: Canonical ErrorCode inventory, extensibility process, and governance rules for the meminit CLI error code enum.
nodes.title: ErrorCode Enum Specification

nodes.description: Normative specification for Meminit Templates v2 system including resolution chain, interpolation syntax, section markers, and validation rules.
nodes.title: Templates v2 Specification

nodes.description: Normative JSON output contract and error envelope for v2-migrated meminit CLI commands (including state queue surfaces).
nodes.title: Agent Output Contract (Templates v2 → v3)

nodes.description: Implementation specification for meminit migrate-templates command to convert legacy templates and configurations to Templates v2 format.
nodes.title: Template Migration Specification
